title: review-policy.yaml
description: Shared tactical review policy: named profiles (rounds + four axes), a per-hard-stage effort/rounds floor (ships OFF), and caps. Documentation schema only — the loader (review_policy_config.py) does presence/shape/enum validation in code, not via jsonschema. ABSENT file => all floors OFF (non-breaking).

profiles.description: Named tactical bundles. Built-in: default, thorough, ship-grade.

stage_floor.description: Per hard-stage opt-in floor on the stamped review-decision. Ships OFF for every stage. Self-discipline tier — a malformed file is a NO-OP, never a blocked gate.

caps.description: Hard ceiling on rounds x lenses to bound token cost.
